overall.description: Static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a gothic-style study hall or library with high vaulted stone ceilings. Students in robes are seated at wooden tables studying, with ornate medieval architecture and warm ambient lighting creating a scholarly atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic study hall with vaulted ceilings and long reading tables

agents.ego_description: static camera positioned behind a studying student, observing the hall and other students

notable_agents.action: student in grey robes sitting at wooden table, reading a book and occasionally turning pages
student in blue robes standing in the middle distance facing away from camera

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting and exposed wooden beams
large stone archway leading to another section of the building
iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the ceiling
long dark wooden study table with open books and papers
ornate wooden cabinet with stacked books and papers on surface
long blue patterned rug running down the center aisle of the hall

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic study hall with high vaulted ceilings and stone architecture. In the foreground, a student in grey robes sits at a wooden table reading, while another student in blue stands in the middle distance. The hall features ornate chandeliers, a decorative rug, and warm diffused lighting creating a quiet scholarly atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a gothic study hall that maintains a quiet, scholarly atmosphere throughout. It begins with a focus on the high vaulted ceilings and ornate stone architecture that define the space. In the foreground, a student in grey robes is seated at a wooden table reading, while the perspective extends toward another student in blue standing in the middle distance. The scene is tied together by the warm, diffused lighting from ornate chandeliers and the presence of a decorative rug, grounding the stillness of the academic environment.
